_note: Template settings.json for ~/.claude/settings.json. The bootstrap script symlinks this into place. Review statusLine before use — it tries `bun` first, falls back to `node`. If you have neither, remove the statusLine block or install one. The enabledPlugins list is the author's preferred set and is kept here as reference material; prune what you don't want.

statusLine.command: bash -c 'plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/claude-hud/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $0 }'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec bun "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"; else exec node "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"; fi'
